title: Arming Swords
description: The perfect texture pack for anyone looking for a little bit longer swords.
body: ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6256b8828a449a65c635a729d77afe01dd0ec74.webp) # VANILLA SWORDS ARE TOO SHORT FOR YOU? - Well I have the perfect sharp pipe for you! - Introducing Arming Swords - More sword for your sword # FEATURES An extensive list: - replaces textures of every sword variant ![DFP License Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f28dce390848e790af498daacd282533ec0bb5cf.png) # SUPPORTED VERSIONS - 1.19 - 1.21.4 # DEVELOPER NOTES - This texture pack was originally posted by me on Planet Minecraft some time ago. I've decided to renew the texture pack and will post newer versions on here. [Original post](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/arming-swords/) # LINKS ![Ko-Fi Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81578c476131e8d131dc7aa2b58857525ea4f9af.png) ![Website Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d733ec80f664d05d32e895120b27255af2c43f4.png) ![Updates Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60f52b867a52a022b51e68dbba88e87fc4c5cdf.png)
